title: Tom’s Dream
description: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Someone's here... Probably Zanbal and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: They won't come, we're not friends anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: ---- should go back to your friends.

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: I'm not!! This is the subject!!!

summary: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
